Tree is located near West End Beach next to the beach volleyball courts and some evergreens. First time at the site but it looks like it's putting out some pretty fruit right now (Labor Day Weekend 2025). Mind the goose droppings. Access: Public.

This is a deep purple-leaved plum tree in the city parkway. Excellent, sweet fruit. Access: Public.

The Cedar Waxwings were nervous that we were harvesting their fruit, but the little trees on the lawn between the sidewalk and the road were prolific! There is plenty for a batch of jam and for the birds. Access: Private. Falling Fruit season: July-July.
